examples: You must know how an ant feels, groveling like that.
Although it is not widely known, it is also the season of groveling.
I'm not that kind of person who is always groveling to the boss, I just do my job and hope that is enough.
Apparently surprised by the news, Avon executives can now begin the process of groveling their way to a plea bargain.
The Spurs aren't groveling or rushing to impress you.
